name: use-navigation
title: useNavigation
description: Standalone keyboard navigation for role-based lists. Uses DOM queries to find navigable items. No provider needed.

content.text: DOM boundary: data-value is opaque to TS; consumers parameterize TValue.
DOM boundary: data-value is opaque to TS; consumers parameterize TValue.
Editable target guard: when an editable element bubbles a key into a wrapper
that ALSO owns the navigation container, let the native control handle the key.
2) the target is NOT itself a navigation item,
3) currentTarget is an ancestor of the items (natural bubble case),
so the user did not explicitly forward the event from the editable.

docs.description: Standalone keyboard navigation for role-based lists. Uses DOM queries to find navigable items. No provider needed.

parameters.name: containerRef
parameters.description: Ref to the container element holding navigable items.

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: ARIA role used to query navigable children within the container.

parameters.name: highlighted
parameters.description: Controlled highlight value. When provided, the hook operates in controlled mode.

parameters.name: onHighlightChange
parameters.description: Called when the controlled highlight value should change. Receives null when highlight is cleared.

parameters.name: onSelect
parameters.description: Called when an item is selected via Space key.

parameters.name: onEnter
parameters.description: Called when Enter is pressed on the highlighted item.

parameters.name: wrap
parameters.description: Wrap around when reaching the first or last item.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: Whether the navigation hook is active.

parameters.name: preventDefault
parameters.description: Call preventDefault() on handled keyboard events.

parameters.name: onNavigationBoundaryReached
parameters.description: Called when the user tries to navigate past the first or last item. Receives the orientation-neutral direction, the originating keyboard event, and the key that hit the boundary.

parameters.name: defaultHighlighted
parameters.description: Initial highlighted value in uncontrolled mode.

parameters.name: upKeys
parameters.description: Custom key names to move highlight up/left.

parameters.name: downKeys
parameters.description: Custom key names to move highlight down/right.

parameters.name: orientation
parameters.description: Navigation axis. Vertical uses ArrowUp/ArrowDown, horizontal uses ArrowLeft/ArrowRight.

parameters.name: skipDisabled
parameters.description: Skip items with aria-disabled="true", data-disabled, or native disabled during navigation.

parameters.name: moveFocus
parameters.description: Move DOM focus to the next item instead of only updating highlight state.

parameters.name: scopeToContainer
parameters.description: Ignore items owned by nested collection containers such as nested radiogroups, listboxes, menus, or tablists.

parameters.name: ownerSelector
parameters.description: Advanced owner selector override for scoping roles that do not have a standard composite owner.

returns.description: Object with highlight state and an onKeyDown handler to attach to the container.

properties.name: highlighted
properties.description: The value of the currently highlighted item, or null.

properties.name: isHighlighted
properties.description: Returns true if the given value is the highlighted item.

properties.name: highlight
properties.description: Imperatively set the highlighted item. Pass null to clear.

properties.name: onKeyDown
properties.description: Keyboard event handler to attach to the container element.

notes.title: Standalone
notes.content: useNavigation does not require KeyboardProvider. It works with a direct onKeyDown handler attached to the container.

notes.title: DOM-based item discovery
notes.content: Navigable items are queried from the DOM using the specified role or the data-diffgazer-navigation-item data contract. Items must have a data-value attribute.

notes.title: Nested collections
notes.content: scopeToContainer is enabled by default so items inside a nested owner container are excluded from the parent navigation order.

notes.title: Controlled and uncontrolled
notes.content: Pass highlighted + onHighlightChange for controlled mode, or use defaultHighlighted for uncontrolled mode.

content.text: biome-ignore lint/a11y/useFocusableInteractive: WAI-ARIA listbox/activedescendant pattern — options stay non-focusable; the listbox container holds focus and aria-activedescendant tracks the active option.
